CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO RAFAEL PRESIDENT HERRERA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-29-2008 AT 10:00AM. (NO SERVICE).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANTS PROCARE PROFESSIONAL CARE MANAGEMENT(SERVICE)AND RAFAEL HERRERA (NO SERVICE) NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEEWOOD PRESS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROCARE PROFESSIONAL CARE MANAGEMENT $2,139.32 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,219.32, DEFENDANT RAFAEL HERRERA DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO SERVICE). DEFENDANT PROCARE PROFESSIONAL CARE MANAGEMENT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PROCARE PROFESSIONAL CARE MANAGEMENT
